info.prompt:
anime art of anime art of a young South Asian girl with a slim, delicate frame standing beneath a sky painted in soft lavender and amber hues at sunset. She is dressed in an elegant ivory and deep maroon Anarkali gown, the flowing fabric adorned with intricate golden embroidery and delicate floral motifs that shimmer subtly under the warm evening light. A lightweight champagne-colored dupatta drapes gracefully from her shoulders, its embroidered borders fluttering gently in the breeze.

Her medium-light brown skin glows softly against the rich contrast of the maroon and ivory ensemble. Long, silky black hair cascades down her back in smooth waves, with a few loose strands framing her face. Her oval-shaped face is refined and youthful, highlighted by large expressive eyes behind round eyeglasses that lend an air of intelligence and quiet charm. Her gaze is calm and thoughtful, carrying a natural elegance that feels both gentle and captivating.

Intricately crafted silver jhumkas sway beside her cheeks, catching glimmers of golden light with every movement. Delicate silver bangles adorn her wrists, complementing the regal detailing of her attire. The luxurious Anarkali flows beautifully around her, creating graceful folds and movement that enhance the dreamlike quality of the scene.

The background is softly blurred with glowing lanterns and warm bokeh lights, creating a magical atmosphere that draws attention to her serene presence. Every detail—from the embroidered fabric and reflective jewelry to the strands of hair illuminated by sunset light—is rendered with exceptional precision and artistry.

world-class masterpiece, ultra-detailed anime illustration, ivory and deep maroon color palette, elegant Anarkali gown, cinematic lighting, highly detailed eyes, intricate embroidery, realistic jewelry reflections, flowing fabric, dreamy atmosphere, breathtaking composition, vibrant yet sophisticated colors, soft depth of field, 4k, best quality, anime art, masterpiece, award-winning illustration, aesthetically stunning, exceptional attention to detail.

, world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
